2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.1.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

4047.issue: [S4047] Adapter "tesla-wallconnector3" is not yet available in the stable repository. Please consider adding it.

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/teslawb3ip" attribute "help" uses key "iphelp" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#156] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/nobl/ioBroker.tesla-wallconnector3/issues/156)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/nobl/ioBroker.tesla-wallconnector3/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
